title: Vedansh Education & Technology – Full Educational App

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor that stores mock student data including name, phone number (as identifier), streak count, progress per subject, quiz scores, and achievement badges. Expose query and update functions: getStudent, updateStreak, saveQuizScore, getLeaderboard.
acceptanceCriteria: getStudent returns student record by phone ID
updateStreak increments daily streak
saveQuizScore persists score and updates leaderboard
getLeaderboard returns top 10 scores

requirements.text: Build an animated splash screen component that displays the Vedansh logo (stylized V with torch flame and circuit pattern), the brand name 'Vedansh Education & Technology', and the tagline 'Seekho, Badho, Chamko' for 3 seconds with entrance animations before routing to the landing page.

quotes: Animated splash screen (3 seconds with logo animation)
Animated splash screen with Vedansh logo

acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen displays for exactly 3 seconds
Logo animates in with scale/fade effect
Tagline appears with staggered animation
Automatically transitions to landing page after 3 seconds

requirements.text: Build the Landing/Home page with: a hero section featuring 'Seekho, Badho, Chamko' as the main headline, sub-headline 'India's #1 AI-Powered Free Education Platform', sub-slogan '100% Free Quality Education Forever | Powered by AI', a NEP 2020 Compliant badge, animated stats (50+ Exams, Class 1-BTech, 1Cr+ Students), a feature highlights grid (6+ cards), and a Founder section with Mrityunjay Pandey's name, BTech CSE title, and Founder & CEO designation.

quotes: Founder section with Mrityunjay Pandey, BTech CSE

acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline 'Seekho, Badho, Chamko' is prominently displayed
All three stat counters animate on scroll
NEP 2020 badge is visible
Founder section shows Mrityunjay Pandey, BTech CSE, Founder & CEO
Feature highlights grid shows at least 6 cards

requirements.text: Build the Authentication page with OTP-based login: a mobile number input field, 6 animated OTP digit boxes that auto-focus on entry, a 'Fully Secure | End-to-End Encrypted' badge, a resend OTP button with 30-second countdown timer, and a gradient background. On successful OTP entry (any 6 digits accepted as mock verification), route to the Dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile number input accepts 10-digit numbers
6 OTP boxes auto-advance focus on digit entry
Resend button is disabled during 30-second countdown
Security badge is visible
Any valid 6-digit entry routes to dashboard

requirements.text: Build the post-login Dashboard with: a welcome message using the student's name, quick access cards for Study, Practice, Wellness, and AI Tools, a daily streak counter with fire icon, subject progress bars, upcoming quizzes section, a NEP 2020 compliance badge, and a notification bell icon with a mock unread badge count.

quotes: Quick access cards: Study, Practice, Wellness, AI Tools

acceptanceCriteria: Welcome message shows student name
4 quick access cards navigate to correct pages
Streak counter displays current streak with fire icon
Subject progress bars render with percentage values
Notification bell shows badge count

requirements.text: Build the Academic Section page with: a class selector for Class 1 to 12 and BTech (all branches: CSE, ECE, ME, CE, EE, IT, Chemical, etc.), subject cards per class with icons, NCERT Books section with 'Government Approved' badge, Study Material section, Video Lectures section with 'Government Approved' badge, and Notes section with PDF Download button UI.

quotes: Class selector: Class 1 to 12 + BTech (all branches)
Video Lectures with Government Approved badge

acceptanceCriteria: Class selector shows all classes 1-12 plus BTech branches
Selecting a class updates visible subjects
Government Approved badges appear on NCERT Books and Video Lectures sections
PDF Download button is visible on Notes cards
Subject cards display relevant icons

requirements.text: Build the Competitive Exam Prep page listing: JEE Mains+Advanced, NEET, UPSC (IAS/IPS/IFS), SSC (CGL, CHSL, MTS, GD), Banking (IBPS PO, SBI PO, RBI), Railway (RRB NTPC, Group D, ALP), Bihar Police, and 40+ additional exams in a scrollable grid. Each exam card must show Free Study Material, Mock Tests, and Previous Year Papers buttons.

quotes: 50+ more exams listed in scrollable grid
Each with: Free Study Material, Mock Tests, Previous Year Papers

acceptanceCriteria: At least 50 exam entries are visible in the grid
Each card has three action buttons: Free Study Material, Mock Tests, Previous Year Papers
Exam categories are visually grouped or labeled
Page is fully scrollable on mobile

requirements.text: Build the BTech Placement Prep page with branch selector (CSE, ECE, ME, CE, EE, IT, Chemical, etc.) and sections for: DSA & Coding with 'Government Approved' badge, Aptitude & Reasoning, Technical Interview Prep, Resume Builder UI, Company-wise preparation cards (featuring top companies), and placement statistics with animated counters.

quotes: All branches: CSE, ECE, ME, CE, EE, IT, Chemical, etc.

acceptanceCriteria: Branch selector filters visible content
DSA & Coding section has Government Approved badge
Resume Builder section is present with form UI
Company cards show at least 10 top companies
Placement stats animate on entry

requirements.text: Build the AI Tools Hub page with two tools: (1) AI Maths Tutor — an animated interface with a math input field, a mock math keyboard, topic selector (Algebra, Calculus, Statistics, Discrete Math, etc.), and a step-by-step solution display panel; (2) AI English Coach — reading comprehension practice, a speaking practice UI with a microphone button, vocabulary builder, grammar checker UI, and conversation practice section.

quotes: Speaking practice with mic button (UI only)

acceptanceCriteria: Two distinct tool tabs or sections are visible
Math input field accepts text and displays mock step-by-step solution on submit
Topic selector for math is functional
Microphone button is present in English Coach (UI only, no actual recording)
Vocabulary and grammar sections have sample content

requirements.text: Build the Student Wellness & Success Hub page with four card sections: (1) Health & Wellness — mental health tips, meditation timer UI, eye strain alerts, posture reminders; (2) Time Management — fully functional Pomodoro timer (25-minute study / 5-minute break cycles with start/pause/reset), study schedule planner UI, daily goals checklist; (3) Motivational Hub — daily rotating quote, success stories, achievement badges display; (4) Study Groups — join/create group UI, subject-wise community cards, discussion forum preview.

quotes: Pomodoro timer (25 min study, 5 min break)

acceptanceCriteria: Pomodoro timer counts down from 25:00, switches to 5:00 break automatically
Start, pause, and reset controls work correctly
Daily motivational quote rotates each time the page loads
Achievement badges grid is visible with sample badges
Study Groups section shows join/create UI

requirements.text: Build the Government Resources page with three tabs/sections: Government Jobs (categorized by sector), Scholarships (NSP, state scholarships, etc.), and Government Schemes for students. Each entry card must display an 'Official Source' badge and a 'View Details' button. Use sample data to populate all sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Three distinct tabs or sections for Jobs, Scholarships, Schemes
Each card has an official source badge
At least 5 sample entries per section
View Details button is present on every card

requirements.text: Build the NCERT Library page with: a class selector (1-12), subject book cards displaying cover image placeholders, a 'Government Approved' stamp on each card, 'Read Online' and 'Download PDF' action buttons, and a search bar that filters books by class or subject name.

quotes: Beautiful book cards with cover images

acceptanceCriteria: All classes 1-12 are selectable
Book cards show subject name, class, and Government Approved stamp
Read Online and Download PDF buttons are visible
Search bar filters results in real time

requirements.text: Build the Interactive Quizzes page with: subject-wise quiz selection, a timed quiz mode (mock 30-second countdown per question), a leaderboard tab showing top scores fetched from the backend, score tracking displayed after quiz completion, a review answers screen, and a confetti animation triggered on quiz completion.
acceptanceCriteria: Subject selector shows at least 6 subjects
Timer counts down per question
Confetti animation triggers on quiz completion
Score is saved to backend via saveQuizScore
Leaderboard fetches from backend getLeaderboard
Review mode shows correct answers

requirements.text: Build the Education Tools page (BTech) with branch-wise tabs and tool UIs: CSE — a code editor UI (syntax-highlighted textarea) and algorithm visualizer mockup; ECE — a circuit simulator UI mockup; ME — a CAD viewer UI mockup. Each tool must display a 'Government Approved' badge.
acceptanceCriteria: Branch tabs switch visible tool content
Code editor textarea is visible for CSE
Government Approved badge appears on all tools
Placeholder visuals present for circuit simulator and CAD viewer

requirements.text: Build the About page with: the Vedansh Education & Technology story, Mission statement ('Free Quality Education for Every Indian'), Vision statement ('Empowering Bharat through Technology'), a Founder profile card (Mrityunjay Pandey, BTech CSE, Founder & CEO), NEP 2020 compliance details section, and a '100% Free Forever' commitment banner.

quotes: Mission: 'Free Quality Education for Every Indian'
Founder profile: Mrityunjay Pandey, BTech CSE, Founder & CEO

acceptanceCriteria: Mission and Vision sections are clearly labeled
Founder card displays name, title, and role
NEP 2020 section explains compliance
100% Free Forever banner is prominent

requirements.text: Implement a fixed bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs: Home, Study, AI Tools, Wellness, and Profile. The active tab must be visually highlighted. The bar must remain visible across all authenticated pages and use brand colors (Deep Navy background, Vibrant Orange active indicator).

quotes: Bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs: Home, Study, AI Tools, Wellness, Profile

acceptanceCriteria: Bottom nav is fixed to viewport bottom on all authenticated pages
Active tab shows orange highlight
Tapping each tab navigates to the correct page
Nav is fully responsive on mobile

requirements.text: Implement a dark/light mode toggle accessible from the Dashboard and top navbar. Dark mode uses Deep Navy (#0A1628) backgrounds; light mode uses #F8F9FA. The selected mode must persist in localStorage and apply globally across all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle button is visible in the header/navbar
Dark mode applies deep navy background globally
Light mode applies light gray background globally
Preference persists after page refresh via localStorage

requirements.text: Apply the brand design system consistently across the entire app: primary color #0A1628 (Deep Navy), secondary #FF6B00 (Vibrant Orange), accent #FFD700 (Gold), success green #00C851. Use glassmorphism card effects (frosted glass with backdrop blur), gradient hero sections, loading skeleton placeholders, toast notifications for user actions, and smooth Framer Motion page transitions. Place a branded footer on non-dashboard pages with text 'Vedansh Education & Technology | Founded by Mrityunjay Pandey | BTech CSE | © 2024 All Rights Reserved | 100% Free Education Forever' with social media icons and NEP 2020 badge.

quotes: Smooth page transitions with Framer Motion
Brand Colors: Deep Navy Blue (#0A1628), Vibrant Orange (#FF6B00), Pure White, Gold (#FFD700)

acceptanceCriteria: All brand colors are used consistently per spec
Cards use glassmorphism/frosted glass styling
Page transitions animate smoothly
Loading skeletons appear before content loads
Toast notifications fire on key actions
Footer appears on all non-dashboard pages with correct branding text

requirements.text: Generate and render the Vedansh Education & Technology logo as a static asset: a stylized letter 'V' incorporating a torch flame and circuit board trace pattern, using brand colors Deep Navy and Vibrant Orange on a white or transparent background.

quotes: Logo: A stylized 'V' with a torch/flame and circuit board pattern representing technology + education

acceptanceCriteria: Logo image is displayed in the splash screen
Logo is displayed in the top navbar/header
Logo uses the stylized V with torch and circuit elements

constraints: All AI tool interactions (Math Tutor, English Coach) must be UI-only mock interfaces — no actual AI/LLM API calls
OTP verification must be a mock flow — any 6-digit code is accepted
PDF download and Read Online buttons are UI-only and do not fetch real files
Microphone button in English Coach is UI-only with no actual audio recording
Use only brand colors: #0A1628, #FF6B00, #FFD700, #00C851, white, and #F8F9FA
nonGoals: Real OTP SMS delivery or phone verification
Real PDF hosting or file downloads
Video streaming or actual video lectures
External API integrations (government portals, NCERT servers, etc.)

required: Vedansh Education & Technology logo: stylized letter V with torch flame and circuit board traces, Deep Navy (#0A1628) and Vibrant Orange (#FF6B00) on transparent background (vedansh-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Splash screen hero background: abstract dark navy blue gradient with glowing orange and gold light rays and subtle circuit pattern texture (splash-bg.dim_1080x1920.png)
Founder profile avatar placeholder: professional illustration of a young Indian male engineer in formal attire with tech background (founder-avatar.dim_256x256.png)
NEP 2020 compliance badge: official-style green and white badge with 'NEP 2020 Compliant' text and checkmark seal (nep2020-badge.dim_200x80.png)
Government Approved stamp: green circular stamp graphic with checkmark and 'Govt. Approved' text (govt-approved-stamp.dim_128x128.png)
